headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Fortinet (FTNT) After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Fortinet at around US$81.84 is priced for opportunity or already reflects the story, the next sections will help you size up what you are really paying for. The stock has returned 6.7% over the last 7 days, while the 1 year return sits at negative 14.9% and the 5 year return at 102.8%. This gives you a mix of recent volatility and longer term strength to keep in mind. Recent headlines around Fortinet have focused on its position within cybersecurity and on how...

headline: Assessing Fortinet (FTNT) Valuation As Profit Growth Meets Mixed Recent Shareholder Returns
summary: Fortinet (FTNT) is back in focus after recent trading saw the cybersecurity stock move, while delivering annual revenue of US$6.8b and net income of US$1.9b, putting profitability and scale front and center for investors. See our latest analysis for Fortinet. At a share price of US$81.84, Fortinet has seen a 6.7% 7 day share price return and an 8.6% 90 day share price return, while the 1 year total shareholder return is a 14.9% decline and the 5 year total shareholder return is 102.8%.
